title: PolygonShape
description: A convex polygon defined by ≥3 local-space vertices. Input vertices may be given in either winding; they are canonicalised to counter-clockwise and the outward edge normals are precomputed. Construction throws on any non-convex, degenerate, or under-specified input — there is no silent repair. Vertices and normals are exposed as flat `[x0, y0, x1, y1, …]` arrays to keep the narrow phase allocation-free; both are frozen.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: A convex polygon defined by ≥3 local-space vertices. Input vertices may be given in either winding; they are canonicalised to counter-clockwise and the outward edge normals are precomputed. Construction throws on any non-convex, degenerate, or under-specified input — there is no silent repair.
Vertices and normals are exposed as flat `[x0, y0, x1, y1, …]` arrays to keep the narrow phase allocation-free; both are frozen.

members.name: area
members.description: Surface area in px². mass = density × area.

members.name: boundingRadius
members.description: Radius of the smallest circle about the local origin enclosing the shape.

members.name: centroidX
members.description: X of the area centroid in local space.

members.name: centroidY
members.description: Y of the area centroid in local space.

members.name: normals
members.description: Outward unit edge normals (edge i spans vertex i → i+1), flattened.

members.name: unitInertia
members.description: Second moment of area (∫ r² dA) about the centroid; inertia = density × unitInertia.
